# React Front-End Agent

## Responsibilities
- Initialize the React app using `create-react-app`.
- Set up Amplify libraries and configure `Amplify.configure()`.
- Build the following components:
  - `<Authenticator />`: Login/Register UI.
  - `FeedbackForm`: POST `/feedback` form.
  - `Recommendation`: GET `/recommendation` display.
- Deploy the front-end using Amplify Console.

## Skills Required
- Proficiency in React and JavaScript.
- Experience with AWS Amplify and its CLI.
- Knowledge of API integration with JWT authentication.
- Familiarity with front-end deployment pipelines.

## Integration with CI/CD
- Use Amplify Console for continuous deployment.
- Connect the front-end repository to Amplify Console.
- Automate builds and deployments on code commits.
